scenario.name: Basic Sipstone UAC
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:sbcdev4.com@[field3] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: sips:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port]:gsid=3551efe6-f106-41ea-a90b-000c29aec2b8 Supported: replaces Max-Forwards: 70 P-Asserted-Identity: sip:50001@trk.com Subject: Performance Test User-Agent: Avaya J179 IP Phone 4.0.2.1.3 c81fea85c1d6 User-to-User: 00FA080001001056965CFB;encoding=hex Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=- 1509186683 1 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP4 [local_ip] t=0 0 a=avf:avc=y prio=n a=csup:avf-v0 m=audio 2098 RTP/AVP 8 0 18 101 a=sendrecv a=fmtp:18 annexb=no a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=ptime:20 a=tcap:1 RTP/AVP a=pcfg:1 t=1 a=1 a=pcfg:2 t=2 b=AS:64

ACK sip:185.247.243.25:5060;transport=tls SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 ACK Contact: sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=TLS Max-Forwards: 70 [routes] Content-Type: application/sdp Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0

INVITE sip:sbcdev4.com@[field3] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];tag=[call_number] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 INVITE Contact: sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port]:gsid=3551efe6-f106-41ea-a90b-000c29aec2b8 Supported: replaces Max-Forwards: 70 P-Asserted-Identity: sip:50001@trk.com Subject: Performance Test User-Agent: Avaya J179 IP Phone 4.0.2.1.3 c81fea85c1d6 User-to-User: 00FA080001001056965CFB;encoding=hex Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]

ACK sip:185.247.243.25:5060;transport=tls SIP/2.0 Via: [$5] From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 ACK Contact: sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=TLS Max-Forwards: 70 [routes] Content-Type: application/sdp Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0

BYE sip:185.247.243.25:5060;transport=tls SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> CSeq: 2 BYE [routes] Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0
